units.source_text: 1 與未結算反向回購協議相關之款額為754億美元，計入貸款及其他信貸相關承諾以及財務擔保，相關款額⼀旦被取⽤，將分類為「反向回購協議 – 非交易⽤途」。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The amount related to unsettled reverse repurchase agreements is US$75.4 billion, including loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees. Once the relevant amounts are withdrawn, they will be classified as "reverse repurchase agreements - non-trading purposes."
units.translation_en: 1 The amount related to unsettled reverse repurchase agreements is US$75.4 billion, including loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees. Once the relevant amounts are withdrawn, they will be classified as "reverse repurchase agreements - non-trading purposes."

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 The amount related to unsettled reverse repurchase agreements is US$75.4 billion, including loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees. Once the relevant amounts are withdrawn, they will be classified as "reverse repurchase agreements - non-trading purposes."

units.source_text: 1 與未結算反向回購協議相關之款額為490億美元，計入貸款及其他信貸相關承諾以及財務擔保，相關款額⼀旦被取⽤，將分類為「反向回購協議 – 非交易⽤途」。
units.translation_target_text: 1 The amount related to unsettled reverse repurchase agreements is US$49 billion, including loans and other credit-related commitments and financial guarantees. Once the relevant amounts are withdrawn, they will be classified as "reverse repurchase agreements - non-trading purposes."

Once the relevant amounts are withdrawn, they will be classified as "reverse repurchase agreements - non-trading purposes."
